problem id: 8b12ff37
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11011000 -> 00000001
  10011111 -> 11000001
  01001010 -> 10000000
  10110010 -> 10000001
  11101000 -> 00000001
  00001100 -> 00000000
  01100110 -> 10000000
  11111110 -> 10000001
  10111101 -> 01000001

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 10000000
